title: Init Containers
text:
This page provides an overview of init containers: specialized containers that run
before app containers in a
Pod
.
Init containers can contain utilities or setup scripts not present in an app image.
You can specify init containers in the Pod specification alongside the
containers
array (which describes app containers).
In Kubernetes, a
sidecar container
is a container that
starts before the main application container and
continues to run
. This document is about init containers:
containers that run to completion during Pod initialization.
